title: Could Tilray (TLRY) Gain an Edge in Europe Through Its New German Medical Cannabis Launch?
text: Tilray's expansion in Germany represents a strategic opportunity in Europe's largest medical cannabis market, valued at more than 670 million euros in 2025 with projections of 1.32 billion euros by 2029. Tilray is leveraging EU production hubs in Portugal and Canada, expanding across Germany, Poland, and UK, positioning to capture 18% CAGR in Europe's 3.2 billion dollar medical cannabis market by 2030. Tilray's acquisition of a trading license for Aphria RX in Germany gives the company a competitive edge with dual cultivation and trading licenses allowing for vertical integration and improved profit margins. German domestic cultivation has shifted from a restricted tender system to an open licensing framework with producers including Tilray already expanding capacity. The company's strategic positioning in Europe through new German medical cannabis products signals a broader European strategy shift focused on capturing emerging market opportunities.
